notes: Comments and Start landing remain separated: Start without explicit post identity opens the landing, comments with cp_/ck_/h_ open the discussion screen.
Post patcher now sends original text, link and format back to MAX PUT /messages together with attachments, so active links/entities should survive adding the comments keyboard.
Served app.js injects a tiny CSS guard to hide the own-message fallback avatar initial that appeared as stray letter A near the comment bubble.
No overlay, no floating hints, no external code.run /app comments button.
